untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) down-sloping trendline along peaks (not available as indicator), (2) specific 'below-the-stomach' candle pattern formation (no pattern recognition indicator available), (3) support/resistance zone definition (requires manual level input). The pattern requires visual/structural candle analysis unavailable in the indicator set. Approximated using price_pos_20 (position within 20-bar Donchian channel) as proxy for trading range confinement and volume confirmation, but this does not capture the specific trendline and pattern geometry required.
translation_notes: CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction preserved as signal shows breakout in both directions depending on pattern resolution. Entry conditions approximate a candle within a trading range using Donchian positioning. Exit conditions use Donchian channel breakouts as proxies for pattern invalidation. Volume rising condition approximated using hvol_20 comparison. Original pattern geometry (down-sloping trendline, stomach-level reference) cannot be operationalized without custom pattern recognition.
